description: Big, calm, stoic — but completely baffled by mundane insurance paperwork
personality_tr: Büyük ve sakin, güçlü ama sıradan sigorta bürokratik işlemleri karşısında şaşıran devasa ayı

expressions.baffled: tiny glasses slipping down nose, papers everywhere

visual.size: very large, gentle giant, wears a tiny bowtie that's comically small

veo_style_guide: 3D animated anthropomorphic brown bear character, bipedal, massive body wearing a tiny bowtie and miniature reading glasses, large gentle eyes, cartoon proportions with exaggerated size contrast, warm cozy lighting, 9:16 vertical frame
catchphrases_tr: Bu formu doldurabilirdim... kış uykusundan önce.
